action_choice_hints: Action cell is the first non-empty cell encountered along a specific direction from a reference point.
Action cell is aligned in the same row or column as a key token.
Action cell is adjacent to a boundary or obstacle in a particular direction.
Action cell is within a contiguous region connected to a key token.
Action cell is in a region that is not blocked by obstacles when moving from a reference point.
feature_family_hints: Directional reachability: Needed to determine if a cell can be reached from a reference point without being blocked.
Relative position: Needed to capture whether a cell is above, below, left, or right of a key token.
Local neighborhood patterns: Needed to assess the configuration of tokens within a small radius around the action cell.
Connectivity: Needed to determine if the action cell is part of the same connected component as a key token.
Existence of token roles: Needed to check if certain token roles are present anywhere in the grid.
